notes: Screenshots capture Round 1 details and the troop totals at the start of Round 2.
No final battle outcome was visible in the supplied screenshots.
Round 1 shows the Shieldbearer core trading almost evenly into a larger Spearmen army.

Under Ebbing Fury from Rhysarion: -27.5% damage.
Forest's Instinct affected Rhysarion and Vhagar: +8% Physical damage.
Forest's Instinct affected Rhysarion and Vhagar: -8% Tactical damage received.
Basic Attack hit Crimson for 194 Physical damage; Crimson had 7,291 troops remaining.
Under Hunter's Bane from enemy Venator: -34.53% Intelligence.
Under Warrior's Resilience from itself: -8% damage received.
Under Ebbing Fury from Rhysarion: -27.5% damage.
Basic Attack hit enemy Venator for 185 Physical damage; enemy Venator had 7,300 troops remaining.
Ebbing Fury applied to itself: -27.5% damage.
Dawnsong hit Syrax for 131 Physical damage; Syrax had 8,294 troops remaining.
Dawnsong hit enemy Venator for 160 Physical damage; enemy Venator had 7,140 troops remaining.
Basic Attack hit Syrax for 138 Physical damage; Syrax had 8,156 troops remaining.
Under Mindful Synergy from Syrax: +7.602% Intelligence and +7.602% Instinct.
Under Warrior's Zeal from Venator: +20 Instinct and +20 Initiative.
Under Ebbing Fury from Rhysarion: -27.5% damage.
Basic Attack hit Malachite for 172 Physical damage; Malachite had 6,629 troops remaining.
Under Mindful Synergy from Syrax: +7.602% Intelligence and +7.602% Instinct.
Under Warrior's Zeal from itself: +16% Physical damage.
Under Ebbing Fury from Rhysarion: -27.5% damage.
Basic Attack hit Vhagar for 242 Physical damage; Vhagar had 6,761 troops remaining.
Feral Strike hit Rhysarion for 90 Physical damage; Rhysarion had 6,677 troops remaining.
Feral Strike hit Rhysarion again for 90 Physical damage; Rhysarion had 6,587 troops remaining.
Under Mindful Synergy from itself: +7.602% Intelligence and +7.602% Instinct.
Under Ebbing Fury from Rhysarion: -27.5% damage.
Blazing Fury hit Rhysarion for 363 Tactical damage; Rhysarion had 7,038 troops remaining.
Basic Attack hit Rhysarion for 271 Physical damage; Rhysarion had 6,767 troops remaining.

round_1_trade.interpretation: The Shieldbearer core traded slightly ahead in Round 1 despite starting with 2,610 fewer troops.

mechanics_observed.observation: Applied -27.5% damage to both sides during Round 1, strongly suppressing early burst.
Triggered in Round 1, granting +8% Physical damage and -8% Tactical damage received to Vhagar and Rhysarion.
Enemy Syrax buffed enemy Syrax, Venator, and Crimson with +7.602% Intelligence and +7.602% Instinct.
Enemy Venator reduced Vhagar's Intelligence by -34.53%.
Enemy Venator produced two 90 Physical damage hits into Rhysarion after a Basic Attack.
